title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama CLI and server that lets you run Llama 2, Code Llama, Mistral, Gemma, and other models locally on macOS, Linux, and Windows.

title: langchain-ai/langchain
summary: Python/JS library with first-class Ollama integration for building LLM applications via LangChain’s ChatOllama and Ollama embeddings.

title: ollama-js on npm
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama API—list, pull, generate, chat, and embed with local models.

title: ollama-python on PyPI
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, pull, push, and create models with a simple asyncio/sync API.

title: ollama-webui/ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama—chat history, model management, multimodal, and OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

title: jmorganca/ollama
summary: Early personal repo that became the official ollama/ollama; still hosts experimental branches and discussion.

title: ollama-ai/ollama-ai
summary: Community organization curating model conversion scripts, quantized GGUFs, and example apps for Ollama.

title: ollama-copilot on npm
summary: Lightweight VS-Code language-server that turns any Ollama model into an inline coding assistant.

title: ollama-rag on PyPI
summary: Plug-and-play RAG package using Ollama embeddings + Chroma; one CLI command to chat with your documents.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server with slash commands and moderation hooks.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Minimal Streamlit chat UI that proxies to Ollama with session memory and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node-affinity and PVC model cache.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama featuring sync/async APIs, SSE streaming, and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-experiments
summary: Collection of notebooks benchmarking Llama 3, Phi-3, and Mistral on Ollama for RAG, tool-use, and agents.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an Ollama sidebar for summarizing notes, brainstorming, and Q&A without leaving the vault.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Merged Nixpkgs derivation for Ollama enabling reproducible installs on NixOS with CUDA and ROCm variants.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for deterministic LLM-based tests.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API with tokio and serde.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Experimental Zig client for Ollama demonstrating HTTP streaming and JSON parsing with the standard library only.

title: r/ollama – Local LLM discussion
summary: Active subreddit for sharing model files, troubleshooting GPU issues, and showcasing Ollama integrations.
